# org-instance

> Agent-facing markdown wiki (forge-wiki). Read INDEX.md first; files carry OKF-compatible YAML frontmatter (type + description).

## memory/

- [deploy-runbook](memory/deploy-runbook.md): Production deploy sequence for the fleet-api service, including the one step that cannot be automated.

## signals/

- [2026-07-14-latency-budget](signals/2026-07-14-latency-budget.md): Measured p99 for fleet-api is 380ms — the planning doc's 250ms was an estimate, never re-measured.
